_comment: schema: { id (kebab-case string), tree ('Angler'|'Naturalist'|'Mariner'|'Prospector'|'Spirit'), parents ([] for roots, otherwise list of node ids — ANY parent at rank>=1 unlocks), label, description, max_rank (u32 1-5), effect (string id matched in skill_tree.rs effect_for), per_rank (f32 magnitude). description fields are user-editable narrative.

label: Quick Strike
description: Catch progress fills 1% faster per rank.

label: Steady Hand
description: Rectangle drifts less; +0.5% control per rank.

label: Perfect Throw
description: Near-max casts give +20% catch progress per rank.

label: Coyote Grip
description: Rectangle hovers 2 extra frames per rank when keys release.

label: Iron Arms
description: Rectangle is +1 cell taller per 2 ranks.

label: Heavy Yank
description: Yank-down ('t') grows stronger per rank.

label: Snap Reel
description: +0.5% catch progress per rank when fish is near a bar edge.

label: Effortless
description: +5% in-rectangle catch progress per rank. Stacks with the rest.

label: Patience
description: Bite window is +5% longer per rank.

label: Line Tension
description: Fish are 3% less likely to slip when meter is past halfway.

label: Wide Net
description: Catch zone is +1 rectangle row taller per rank.

label: Fisherman's Eye
description: Pre-reveal the fish difficulty stars 1s earlier per rank.

label: Quick Recast
description: Auto-recast on missed bite within 2 seconds.

label: Master Angler
description: Capstone: +5% to every fishing stat per rank.

label: Angler's Devotion
description: +0.01% catch speed per lifetime fish caught (capped at +20%).

label: Biome Savant
description: +5% catch value per rank in your current biome.

label: Weather Eye
description: Preferred-weather bonus +50% per rank.

label: Early Riser
description: +5% rare-fish chance per rank during morning hours.

label: Nocturnal
description: +5% rare-fish chance per rank during night hours.

label: Desert Walker
description: +8% catch value per rank when fishing in Desert biome.

label: Tundra Walker
description: +8% catch value per rank when fishing in Tundra biome.

label: Swamp Walker
description: +8% catch value per rank when fishing in Swamp biome.

label: Meadow Walker
description: +8% catch value per rank when fishing in Meadow biome.

label: Season Attuned
description: +5% catch value per rank during the current season's signature fish.

label: Dawn Master
description: Dusk rare-fish window lasts 1 in-game hour longer per rank.

label: Midnight Master
description: Midnight rare boost doubled per rank.

label: Variant Caller
description: +1% chance per rank to roll a variant (cosmic/divine/mineral) fish.

label: Trapper
description: Fish you've hooked once are 5% easier per rank on every later attempt.

label: Mapped Mind
description: Fog of war reveals a 1-tile larger radius per rank.

label: Naturalist's Devotion
description: +0.5% rare-fish chance per biome you've explored.

label: Sea Legs
description: Boat moves at full overworld speed instead of slowed.

label: Deepwater Savvy
description: +10% catch value per rank in DeepWater tiles.

label: Ocean Native
description: +5% rare-fish chance per rank when fishing the ocean.

label: Saltwater Lungs
description: Atlantis gate threshold drops by 100 fish per rank.

label: Boat Capacity
description: +5 fish-basket slots per rank.

label: Lighthouse
description: Night fishing range +1 tile per rank while on the boat.

label: Anchor
description: Boat doesn't drift when idle. Fixes random ocean nudges.

label: Abyssal
description: +25% chance per rank to roll an ultra-rare ocean fish.

label: Tidekeeper
description: Storms and rain don't reduce catch progress while on the boat.

label: Compass
description: Biome popup shows water type and depth class.

label: Dragon's Favor
description: Bluefin Celestial Dragons occasionally drop scale tokens.

label: Coral Friend
description: +5% chance per rank for Atlantis citizens to drop a recipe.

label: Depth Meter
description: Fish difficulty stars pre-reveal in the hook stage.

label: Sailor's Devotion
description: +1% catch progress on any water tile per rank.

label: Mariner's Luck
description: First 3 casts of each in-game day are guaranteed bites.

label: Swift Swing
description: Mining typing speed +10% per rank (visual; QoL).

label: Iron Grip
description: Vein cooldown -2 minutes per rank.

label: Forgiving Hands
description: Wrong letters during mining are ignored cleanly (no audio sting).

label: Lucky Strike
description: +5% chance per rank to mine 2 ore from a single swing.

label: Assayer
description: +10% ore sale value per rank.

label: Deep Vein
description: +15% chance per rank that a fresh vein has 4 charges instead of 3.

label: Wall Walker
description: Buried walls within 1 tile of you become visible per rank.

label: Quick Descent
description: Mine entrances also surface you back instantly (skip narrator).

label: Crystal Seeker
description: +1% chance per rank to roll diamond instead of common ore.

label: Pickaxe Polish
description: Pickaxe never breaks (no-op for now; reserved for future durability).

label: Miner's Devotion
description: +5% mining xp per rank.

label: Tunneller
description: Buried cave walls become walkable cave floor.

label: Blast
description: First letter typed during mining counts as 3 letters.

label: Master's Seam
description: +2% chance per rank for a vein to yield a rare ore variant.

label: Foreman
description: Capstone: while in mines, mining yield and xp are +10% per rank.

label: Quick Learner
description: +5% xp gain across every skill per rank.

label: Coinpurse
description: +5% valu gain per rank.

label: Lucky
description: +1% global rare-fish chance per rank.

label: Pantheon Devotion
description: +5% catch value per rank in honor of the Pantheon.

label: Inspired
description: Gain 1 bonus skill point every 50 fishing levels.

label: Archivist
description: +1 valu per rank for every fishdex entry filled.

label: Legacy
description: Keep 50% of fishing xp on any future prestige reset (reserved).

label: Blessed
description: +10% chance per rank to keep the fish even after it 'escapes'.

label: Spirit Walker
description: Walk through tree-trunk cells (no collision).

label: Visionary
description: Unique fish glint visible from 2 tiles per rank.

label: Soul Bond
description: Catching the Fallen Fish reduces all vein cooldowns by 5 minutes.

label: Ancestral
description: Village NPCs gain an extra dialogue line.

label: Fey-Touched
description: Every 1000 fish caught, you gain a random buff.

label: Spirit's Devotion
description: +1% to every active stat per rank.

label: Transcendent
description: Capstone: every catch grants a tiny chance to refund a skill point.

label: Iron Lungs
description: +20 max stamina per rank.

label: Relaxed
description: Fishing restores stamina 50% faster per rank.

label: Light Step
description: Walking costs 15% less stamina per rank.

label: Meditative
description: Slowly recover stamina even while not fishing (+0.05 per tick per rank).

label: Second Wind
description: Actions below 10% stamina cost no stamina.
